title: There Are Still Slaves in the World
director: Maleno Malenotti, Roberto Malenotti, Folco Quilici
writer: Baccio Bandini, Gianfranco Calderoni, Roberto Malenotti
actors: Robert Lamoureux, Robin Maugham, Allen Swift
plot: The film documents modern slave trade through a number of Arabian and African countries, under muslim rule. The filming was conducted both in public places, and sometimes with the use of hidden cameras, for high impact scenes of n...
